candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over subtotal/total when both exist.
Same concept as revenue and useful as fallback for years where 'Revenue' is missing.
Not revenue; this is COGS.
Not revenue; this is COGS.

variables.notes: Use 'Revenue' first, with 'Total Revenue' as fallback for years where the primary revenue row is missing.

candidates.why: Direct COGS/cost of sales line.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.
COGS total/fallback label for some years.

variables.notes: Use direct cost line first; total cost-of-revenues row is a fallback when 'Cost of sales' is unavailable.

candidates.why: Best visible operating overhead bucket; excludes COGS and is separate from D&A.
Could be SG&A-related, but appears unpopulated in the preview and is less clearly the main overhead line than 'Other external expenses'.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. 'Other external expenses' is the best overhead component and avoids D&A and COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related wording, but this is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Finished Development Projects  - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period R&D expense line is visible. The only R&D-related income statement line is amortization, which should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost label; usable as fallback if direct interest expense is missing.
Only a lease-interest component, not preferred as the main interest expense line.
Direct interest expense line; preferred choice.
Broad finance-cost label; fallback when direct interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only, not preferred as total interest expense.

variables.notes: Prioritize the direct interest expense line; use broader finance-expense labels only as fallback.

candidates.why: Investment asset, not book equity.
Best available balance-sheet equity line.
Total equity including minority interest; less preferred because it risks double counting with MIB.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total liabilities and equity, not book equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is shown. Use 'Equity' as BE and leave MIB empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement minority allocation, not the preferred balance sheet NCI stock variable.
Income statement minority allocation, not the preferred balance sheet NCI stock variable.
Would be the correct balance-sheet NCI line if needed, but BE is mapped to total 'Equity', so MIB should be left empty to avoid double counting.
Not minority interest alone; it is a total.

variables.notes: Because BE uses the broad 'Equity' line rather than a parent-only equity line, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.
